item.title: ADS & Python Tools, (Sat, Jun 21st)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: Ehsaan Mavani talks about Alternate Data Streams (ADS) in diary entry "Alternate Data Streams ? Adversary Defense Evasion and Detection [Guest Diary]".

item.title: Resurgence of the Prometei Botnet
item.author: Lee Wei Yeong and Pranay Kumar Chhaparwal
item.content:encoded: We identified a resurgence of the Prometei botnet's Linux variant. Our analysis tracks the activity of this cryptominer and its new features.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, June 20th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9498, (Fri, Jun 20th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
